metadata.name: transfer_hook
metadata.description: SSS-2 transfer hook — enforces blacklist checks on every Token-2022 transfer

instructions.name: initialize_extra_account_meta_list
docs: Called once after the SSS-2 mint is created.
Writes the ExtraAccountMetaList PDA so Token-2022 knows which extra
accounts to pass to the hook on every transfer.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList PDA — tells Token-2022 which extra accounts
must be passed to this hook on every transfer.

accounts.name: sss_token_program
docs: The sss-token program whose blacklist PDAs we need to resolve.
Token-2022 can derive blacklist PDAs owned by this program.

accounts.name: roles_config
docs: The roles_config PDA from sss-token — used to verify the payer
is the master authority.  This prevents front-running attacks where
an adversary initializes the ExtraAccountMetaList with a wrong
sss_token_program before the legitimate admin does.
with seeds ["roles_config", mint]) and raw data read for authority.

instructions.name: transfer_hook
docs: The actual transfer hook logic — checks blacklist entries.
Called internally by the fallback below; never called directly by clients.

accounts.name: source_token
docs: Source token account (index 0).

accounts.name: mint
docs: Mint (index 1).

accounts.name: destination_token
docs: Destination token account (index 2).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Source token account authority — owner or delegate (index 3).
Used to detect permanent delegate (seize) operations.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList PDA (index 4).

accounts.name: sss_token_program
docs: The sss-token program (index 5, extra account #0).
Needed so Token-2022 can derive blacklist PDAs owned by sss-token.
Also used as the reference key for ownership checks on blacklist entries.

accounts.name: source_blacklist_entry
docs: Blacklist entry PDA for the source wallet owner (index 6, extra account #1).
Derived as PDA of sss-token: ["blacklist", mint, source_owner].

accounts.name: destination_blacklist_entry
docs: Blacklist entry PDA for the destination wallet owner (index 7, extra account #2).
Derived as PDA of sss-token: ["blacklist", mint, dest_owner].

accounts.name: stablecoin_state
docs: The stablecoin_state PDA (index 8, extra account #3).
Used to identify permanent delegate (seize) operations.
If authority == stablecoin_state, blacklist checks are skipped.

errors.name: SourceBlacklisted
errors.msg: Transfer blocked: source address is blacklisted

errors.name: DestinationBlacklisted
errors.msg: Transfer blocked: destination address is blacklisted

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the stablecoin master authority
